motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 28/45 results (14/15 games). 25 running (Solaris all 3 seeds pending). PPO leads PQN 6-4 on head-to-head Q4. PPO dominates Phoenix (9x) and NameThisGame (1.6x).

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: Phase 1 baseline — 29/45 results (15/15 games). 23 running. PQN dominates Amidar (16x) BattleZone (2x) SpaceInvaders (2x). Both fail on Breakout/Enduro/MontezumaRevenge/Venture.
